name: Josh Hawley
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $983,446 for Josh Hawley in U.S. Senate, MO. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
